# Issue #9: Purchase order service

## Description
Implement purchase order service for ordering materials from suppliers.

## Tasks
- [ ] Create PO with supplier, product, quantity
- [ ] Calculate price with bulk discounts
- [ ] Track PO status (pending, partial, delivered)
- [ ] Implement partial delivery logic (~5-10% chance)
- [ ] Deliver PO and update inventory
- [ ] Cancel PO functionality
- [ ] Add API endpoints for all operations

## Acceptance Criteria
- Bulk discounts applied automatically
- Partial deliveries occur realistically
- Inventory updated on delivery
- All statuses tracked correctly

## Phase
Phase 2 - Core Simulation
